flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Community College of Rhode Island rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.3k → $14.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Community College of Rhode Island rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $5.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Community College of Rhode Island fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).
